kept.text:
Le début de la fin pour Meta $META ? Pas si vite !

Meta vient de publier un signal qui fait peur au marché :

Première baisse historique des utilisateurs actifs :

3,58 milliards → 3,56 milliards 📉

Oui, ça recule.

Mais voilà ce que tout le monde oublie 👇🏻

1/ La tendance de fond reste ultra solide

→ CAGR ~ 7,5%/an depuis 2020

On parle d’une base déjà massive.

À ce niveau, chaque % de croissance devient mécaniquement plus dur.

2/ On touche un plafond… logique

Population mondiale 2026 ≈ 8,1 milliards
Meta = 3,56 milliards d’utilisateurs actifs

Soit près de 44% de la population mondiale

Et encore :

• tout le monde n’a pas internet
• tout le monde n’utilise pas les réseaux sociaux
• certaines zones sont déjà saturées

3/ Le vrai sujet n’est plus la croissance users

Meta n’est plus une “user growth story”

C’est devenu :
→ une machine à monétisation
→ une machine à cash
→ une boîte d’optimisation (ads + IA)

4/ Là où le marché peut se tromper

Beaucoup voient :
→ “moins d’utilisateurs = danger”

Mais les bons investisseurs regardent :
→ ARPU (revenu par utilisateur)
→ marges
→ efficacité publicitaire
→ développement IA

Et là… Meta reste extrêmement solide.

Alors oui, c’est un tournant.
Mais non, ce n’est pas le début de la fin.

C’est le passage d’une phase → hyper croissance → optimisation / rentabilité

Des actionnaires de $META ici ? 👇🏻

We’re proud to announce that Metafyed is officially relaunching its ecosystem with the new $META token on #BNBChain.

🕗 Listing Details  
The new $META token will be live on PancakeSwap at 08:00 UTC today.

This relaunch represents a major step forward, bringing a unified, optimized token structure designed to strengthen the community, enhance utility, and position Metafyed for scalable, long-term growth 📈

⚠️ Important Update  
- The previous META/USDT trading pair on PancakeSwap has been decommissioned effective immediately.  
- Holders of the legacy $META token should refer to our prior official announcement for token migration instructions if you have yet to migrate to the new $META tokens.

- Trade using the new $META (token contract address: 0x2B894151d43866a159128c9D1E9199075aFEd60F)

- Provide liquidity to maximize yield opportunities

This is more than a relaunch, it’s the foundation for what comes next.

profile_bio.description: I am a financial expert and investment analyst. I help investors achieve their financial goals and succeed in the stock market.

tweet.text:
$QQQ Put Ratio Spread - Here We Go Again

Strong earnings from $GOOGL and $AMZN, along with an already de-risking pullback in $MSFT, $NVDA and $META, seem to limit how much tech can fall from here. 

So why not use the opportunity to open another “free” QQQ put ratio spread that only starts losing if the market falls more than 7.5% in the next 19 days? Max profit if $QQQ falls about 5%.

If you’re not already holding too much equity exposure, you can use this as another way to get into $QQQ  if it falls more than 7.5%-which, to me, seems like a great outcome.

Position size matters most.

profile_bio.description: Former Wall Street professional. Special situations, awareness, logic, Buddhism.

quoted_tweet.text: Another $28,000 in two days, once again on $QQQ put spreads. I know a lot of you use them as well, so my recommendation is this: it’s a pity to lose a nice profit. Plus, $VIX seems to fall on down days, which is a bullish sign for the equity markets. So once again, when you have nice profits, just take them. I’ll wait until after tech earnings for the next $QQQ ratio spread opportunity. Overall, it was around a $55,000 gain in one week on three ratio spreads that didn’t go as well as I had hoped.
